Unit Composition --- 1 {{!!title}}

{{||$:/templates/biomorphs-rules}}

;Malanthrope
*A Malanthrope additionally possesses the {{Grasping Tail||$:/templates/tooltips}} biomorph.
*A Malanthrope additionally possesses the {{Extremely Bulky||$:/templates/tooltips}} {{Shadow in the Warp||$:/templates/tooltips}} and {{Synapse Creature||$:/templates/tooltips}} special rules, but lacks the [[Instinctive Behaviour]] and [[Very Bulky]] special rules.

;Options
*May include up to five additional {{!!title}}s - {{!!points}} points/model
*May take items from the {{Biomorphs||$:/templates/tooltips}} list
*If the unit numbers three or more models, one {{!!title}} may be upgraded to a Malanthrope --- 25 points
